response.justification: The candidate is a capable generalist with strong web/full-stack experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and some C/C++ exposure via NI LabWindows/CVI, but the profile does not align with this embedded networking security role. Two hard requirements are unmet: native-level Japanese (the candidate lists no Japanese proficiency) and strong C for UNIX systems development with Linux kernel investigation/modification. There is no demonstrated experience in network security (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal), L2/L3 networking, switch firmware, or chip-vendor SDKs. The relevant security and embedded-networking depth is essentially absent.
strengths: Long, varied software career with C/C++ work on the NI LabWindows/CVI IDE
Strong engineering discipline (TDD, CI/CD, testing) and some embedded/hardware exposure
Comfortable across languages and Linux-based development environments
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency — a hard, native-level requirement
No demonstrated network security, L2/L3 networking, or switch-firmware experience
Primary expertise is web/full-stack, not C-based UNIX/Linux kernel embedded development

key_factors.factor: Limited C/UNIX and no Linux kernel modification
